name: sap-tm
description: SAP Transportation Management (TM) development skill. Use when working with freight orders, transportation orders, freight bookings, carrier selection, charge calculation, transportation planning, dangerous goods, track and trace, settlement, output/forms, BADIs and enhancement spots (/SCMTMS/*), TM ABAP APIs, or TM IDoc integration (SHPMNT, TPSSHT). Covers SAP TM 9.x and embedded TM in S/4HANA.
